programmes.show_description: Jacqui and Andrew are stranded in the dangerous tropical wilderness of the Palmer River region. Meanwhile, the Poseidon Crew face a critical meeting. S7, Ep4
Hike Into Hell. Three of the remaining teams trek through the dense, snake-filled jungle. The journey quickly turns to chaos and one survivalist must be medically evacuated. S4, Ep7
Jeff's Worst Nightmare. With the extraction day looming, two more critical survivalists struggle. Plus, Jeff changes strategy but a medical emergency stops him in his tracks. S4, Ep8
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Maryland Strip Mall. The crew rescue items from a sporting goods shop in Largo, Maryland. Robert and Grayson face a challenge to salvage the property's electrical system. S11, Ep4
Last Trip To Cap Center. The crew focus on salvaging exterior items from the sporting goods shop in Largo, Maryland. Later, they repurpose a box of old farm equipment. S11, Ep5
Teamwork. Emily swallows her pride and offers ex-friend Zeke a job on the Eroica. Plus, Derek runs into trouble while dredging in a gold-rich area and begrudgingly sends out an SOS. S5, Ep13
Turf War. The Kellys face off against Zeke's corporate dredge in a bitter gold war. Meanwhile, Derek plots to invade Shawn's gold-rich spots when he's gone. S5, Ep14
The Gypsies strike a patch of gold but are distracted when thieves raid their nearby lease. Meanwhile, torrential rain disrupts production for the Dirt Dogs. S4, Ep4
The Lake Chelan Dragon. Forrest and zoologist Jessica explore the myth of a lake monster in Lake Chelan. A deep dive reveals scales from what may be the real-life legend. S1, Ep3
Redemption Day. On the Time Bandit, Scott steps up to challenge Mike for the Captain's spot. But all skipper Andy sees is his deck start to disintegrate. S6, Ep14
Valhalla. Captain Phil sadly loses his fight for life while the fleet are out battling a massive storm. But once they find out they celebrate his life - crabber style! S6, Ep15
Brush With Death. A deadly caiman targets Mehgan, but a potentially crippling accident leads to a shocking find - a coded message from the past that may bring them closer to gold. S2, Ep4
Japan's Atlantis. Josh Gates travels to remote Yonaguni Island and dives into the waters of the Pacific Rim to explore an underwater phenomenon described as Japan's Atlantis. S2, Ep7
True Cross Of Christ. Explorer Josh Gates journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul searching for lost pieces of the cross from the crucifixion of Jesus Christ. S2, Ep8
Wisconsin Washout. The homestead of musician Lou and partner Stacey is threatened by water erosion and at serious risk from a torrential rainstorm. The Raneys come to the rescue. S2, Ep9
High Country Bear Lair. The Counters moved to a remote plot in Colorado for much-needed tranquillity. But two years in, their crops are failing, and their teenage kids are bored. S2, Ep10
The Young Guns rethink their black opal hunt when they face impenetrable mine walls. The Blacklighters' ambitious plan is threatened as their generator dies. S5, Ep14
The Bushmen discover a hidden shaft by falling straight down into it. The Young Guns are forced to undertake emergency repairs halfway down a mine shaft. S5, Ep15
Blood & Guts. Winter rages on. There's bloodshed on the Time Bandit, a fight breaks out on the Wizard and a lost bet leads to cod guts on the Brenna A. S12, Ep15
Life Or Death Decision. A rogue wave forces Zack to make a life-or-death decision. Meanwhile, Josh bets on a Bering Sea myth, and Sig turns to daughter Mandy for help. S12, Ep16
The air ambulance airlifts a driver with nasty leg injuries and a woman who's been knocked unconscious after a fall. S2, Ep5
A boy is airlifted after a beach fall and a motorcyclist battles to breathe. Plus, the crew face a tricky landing as they respond to a patient in cardiac arrest. S2, Ep6
Winter storms ravage the Gold Retrievers' new $35,000 dry blower and could end their season. Meanwhile, the pressure to find gold could tear the Ferals apart. S7, Ep5
Goodbye Cruel Waterworld. Medics closely monitor Jeff's high fever and prepare his evacuation. Plus, one survivalist pushes too hard, leading to a medical emergency on the open sea. S4, Ep9
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
New Jersey Mansion. The crew salvage items from a mansion in Livingston, New Jersey. This historic home challenges the team with unusual design nuances and well-built features. S11, Ep6
Firehouse Number 7. Firefighters ask the team to rescue what they can from their old fire house. Then, the guys fill up their trucks with international treasures in North Carolina. S11, Ep7
Unholy Alliance. With the winter crabbing season ending, the fleet battles monster waves. Then, veterans Sig and Steve form an unlikely alliance and Freddy suffers a bloody injury! S15, Ep18
Dark Ship. As smoke fills the Wizard, the Colburns face a dark ship nightmare. And, the storm and towering breakers shatter Jake's steel anchor, threatening the crew. S15, Ep19
Time And Tide Wait For No Man. Winter unleashes its fury on the Summer Bay. A rookie mistake leaves Captain Bill a deckhand short, and Sean finds a fatal flaw in his crab count. S15, Ep20
Dead Or Alive. Each skipper's next move determines who survives the final winter dash. Winds put the Wizard on a collision course and Jake taps a Hillstrand to save the Saga. S15, Ep21
Soldier Of Fortune. The broke Bushmen are forced to trade opal to get a shaft drilled on a new claim. The Digi Diggers get lost exploring a terrifying abandoned mine. S6, Ep11
The Solar System. Lisa jeopardizes a sale with a bespoke jeweller designer. Rod goes toe to toe with ratters who stole opal and equipment from their mine. S6, Ep12
Light And Shadow. A vicious storm threatens to end the Misfits season early. Plus, Issy attempts a new black-lighting technique to impress Opal Joe. S6, Ep13
Rock Hard. Patrick and Kirsty revisit a 15-year-old ocean kyanite dig site. Kyle and Glenn must pivot from quartz to black agate to reach their huge dig target. S2, Ep4
No Shayne No Gain. In their bid to set up a second sapphire mine, The Rubyvale Boys face equipment failures. And the Neils risk their lives in an abandoned quartz mine. S2, Ep5
Fission For Stichtite. Patrick's plan to extract Australia's largest smoky quartz cluster is derailed. Plus, Jarrin and Hugh are forced to resort to more explosive measures. S2, Ep6
The Dust Devils' operation halts and the hold-up could cost them thousands of dollars. A cyclone causes damage to Shane and Russell's wash plant. S5, Ep16
The Poseidon Crew unearth two monster nuggets. The Gold Timers battle extreme heat and millions of flies as they desperately try to find gold. S5, Ep17
Gold thieves hit the Dust Devils' Siberia lease and steal a fortune in gold. Marcus and Linden persevere through extreme heat to unearth more nuggets. S5, Ep18
Life on Fire. Wanda dealt with trauma by relentlessly shopping and hoarding and now faces her fourth eviction. Ray's obsessive collecting has left him isolated. Can they be helped? S1, Ep4
Filling the Void. Charlotte is bubbly and friendly, but behind closed doors, her two-bed bungalow is so full her things pose a physical risk - and her friends fear for her sanity. S1, Ep5
Grim Reaper In The Forest. A mysterious entity is spotted in the Irish countryside. Plus, a seance goes violently wrong, and a UFO pays a visit to the city that never sleeps. S7, Ep9
Nightmare At The Roxie. The crew confront a dark, foreboding energy at the abandoned Roxie Theater in LA. The once majestic cinema was the site of a mysterious suicide. S20, Ep19
